title: Vencier Natural Bamboo Tray Set of 3,Easy Store,Heat Resistant Bamboo Nesting Trays Food and Drinks,Nested Wood Serving Trays Eco-Friendly,Bamboo Utility Trays,1 Large and 2 Small,One Size (ST-130)
features: NATURAL, BIODEGRADABLE BAMBOO - Made from 100% natural bamboo from sustainable resources, these durable nested bamboo trays will help you achieve your daily tasks while also serving nature by being biodegradable.

GREAT VERSATILITY - Use the set of 3 nesting trays as food trays, serving platters, trays for drinks, or breakfast trays. From a coffee table tray to organising a desk to accessorising as a bathroom tray, the options truly are endless.

CONVENIENT TO STORE - Convenience and looks combined. No more space available in your kitchen? Not to worry. With these rectangular nesting trays, the two small trays conveniently fit inside the large tray for space-saving storage.
CONVENIENT SIZING - The large tray measures 33 x 25cm; the two smaller-sized trays are 21 x 14.5cm.

RISK-FREE PURCHASE - While we've created an excellent product, we still wish to provide you with further assurance. Give this set of bamboo trays a try for 30 days. If you're not happy for any reason, simply return the trays for a full money-back refund.
description: Product Description Bamboo Tray Set of 3 | Vencier A Vital Kitchen Accessory This bamboo wood tray set has a high finish, making it the perfect accessory for any modern home. This 3-piece bamboo tray set is perfect for decorating any room. Made from A Grade bamboo, 3 Piece Set This rectangle bamboo tray set comes with not one, but two small nesting trays in addition to the large serving tray. Vital Kitchen Accessory We’re completely sure you’ll be more than delighted once you get your hands on them. Even when stacked, these trays make for a very handy catchall. Stops the Spills Featuring raised edges, these decorative bamboo trays stop spillages in their tracks. If any spills do occur, simply wipe the bamboo down with a damp cloth. Space-Saving With space at a premium in many homes, even if there’s little to no storage capacity available in your kitchen, with this space-saving set of 3 bamboo trays you’ll always be able to find a place to keep them. Highly Versatile Made of sustainably-harvested bamboo these nested wood trays are up to just about any task you care to dream of. Let the smaller ones be used to bring coffee to guests. Then, when serving appetizers, charcuterie, or breakfast in bed, reach for the large one Specifications Material : Bamboo Size : The large tray measures 33 x 25cm; the two smaller-sized trays are 21 x 14.5cm. In the box : 3pcs Serving Tray
